description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named documentation that builds and publishes documentation. Trigger the workflow manually, on push or pull request to the main branch for specific paths, and run a two-job workflow. The build job checks out the repository, sets up Python 3.9, installs dependencies, builds the documentation, and uploads it as an artifact. The publish job waits for the build job, downloads the artifact, and deploys it to the gh-pages branch using the github-pages-deploy-action.
